configurePresets.name: windows-default
configurePresets.description: MM2/MM1 crypto uses system BCrypt; no OPENSSL_ROOT_DIR or vcpkg OpenSSL needed.

configurePresets.name: windows-vcpkg
configurePresets.displayName: Windows: vcpkg toolchain (optional; crypto still BCrypt)
configurePresets.description: Use when you rely on vcpkg for other ports; ZChatIM on Windows does not link OpenSSL for MM2.
